rules.name: no-skip-commit-hooks
rules.reason: Skipping commit hooks bypasses pre-commit checks. Fix the hook issue or get team approval.

rules.name: no-skip-commit-hooks-short
rules.reason: -n skips commit hooks (same as --no-verify). Fix the hook issue or get team approval.

rules.name: no-skip-push-hooks
rules.reason: Skipping push hooks bypasses pre-push checks. Fix the hook issue or get team approval.

rules.name: no-skip-merge-hooks
rules.reason: Skipping merge hooks bypasses pre-merge checks. Fix the hook issue or get team approval.

rules.name: no-skip-rebase-hooks
rules.reason: Skipping rebase hooks bypasses commit validation. Fix the hook issue or get team approval.
